name: Fettuccine in Lemon Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cooked ham, cut into 2-inch strips
1 1/2 cups frozen asparagus cuts or green beans, thawed
3/4 cup whipping cream, half and half or evaporated skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccini to desired doneness as directed on package. Drain and keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, melt margarine in a large skillet or Dutch oven over low heat.
3. Add ham and asparagus or beans. Cook and stir for 3-4 minutes or until well heated.
4. Stir in cream, lemon juice, and lemon peel (if using). The mixture will look curdled.
5. Cook over low heat for 3 minutes or until the mixture thickens slightly and is smooth, stirring frequently.
6. Immediately stir in cooked fettuccine. Toss to coat with sauce.
7. Garnish with additional grated lemon peel, if desired.
